subTitle: Questions about Anthra's engineering work, project fit, and custom system planning.

faqs.question: What types of projects does Anthra Systems take on?
faqs.answer: Anthra works on custom electronics, embedded systems, industrial IoT, automation, smart devices, connected vehicles, edge AI, mechatronics, and applied R&D for real machines, products, and field sites.

faqs.question: Can Anthra help if the requirement is not fully defined yet?
faqs.answer: Yes. Anthra can begin with problem study, feasibility, architecture, and prototyping so the right technical direction becomes clear before a full build.

faqs.question: Does Anthra build only software or complete systems?
faqs.answer: Anthra focuses on complete physical-world systems, combining hardware, firmware, software, dashboards, connectivity, automation logic, sensors, actuators, enclosures, and deployment support where required.

faqs.question: What kind of project support can I expect?
faqs.answer: Support depends on the project scope and can include requirements discussion, design, prototyping, testing, field validation, documentation, iteration, and deployment assistance.

faqs.question: Can Anthra work with existing machines or field equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many Anthra solutions are designed around existing machines, vehicles, water systems, farms, cameras, and field assets so clients can improve visibility, control, automation, or intelligence without starting from scratch.

faqs.question: Does Anthra Systems support larger deployments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Anthra can help plan pilot systems, field trials, and scalable deployment paths for teams that need reliable connected systems across multiple machines, sites, vehicles, or devices.
